div.h2: st_info Byte: High Nibble (Binding) × Low Nibble (Type)

ol.li: Index 0 is always the STN_UNDEF null symbol.
Symbols with STB_LOCAL binding must precede all STB_GLOBAL and STB_WEAK symbols.
The .symtab section header's sh_info field holds the index of the first non-local symbol.

div.p: The st_info byte packing: ┌───────────┬───────────┐ │ Binding │ Type │ │ (4 bits) │ (4 bits) │ └───────────┴───────────┘ High Low Nibble Nibble
Data symbols int buffer[100] (may be COMMON)
.text, .data Used in relocs S + A formula
